name: Exness
description_short: High-volume forex broker with near-zero spreads, unlimited leverage options, and instant withdrawals processing.
description_long:
Exness has grown to become one of the highest-volume forex brokers globally, processing over $3 trillion in monthly trading volume. The broker is known for its ultra-competitive spreads, instant withdrawal processing, and flexible leverage options that can be set up to unlimited for smaller accounts.

Exness offers several account types: Standard (no commission, from 0.3 pips), Standard Cent (for micro trading), Raw Spread (from 0.0 pips, $3.50/lot commission), and Zero (0.0 pips on top 30 instruments, $3.50/lot). All accounts have no minimum deposit requirement on Standard, while professional accounts require $200.

The instant withdrawal feature is a major differentiator -- most withdrawal requests are processed in seconds rather than the days typical at other brokers. Exness is regulated by FCA, CySEC, FSA, and FSCA, providing strong client fund protection across multiple jurisdictions.
pros: Near-zero spreads on Raw and Zero accounts
No minimum deposit on Standard accounts
cons: Not available to US or EU residents (some regions)
Unlimited leverage is risky for inexperienced traders
Standard account spreads above ECN competitors
Brand less recognized than IG or OANDA
